source_provenance.source_citation: SuperPower 2G HTS tape publicly documented specs + HTS Modelling Workgroup baseline (htsmodelling.com)

scope_caveats: Industry-typical values, NOT lot-specific. Real-device design requires per-batch Jc(B,T,θ) data table.
Anisotropy γ ≈ 5 is a rough average; actual REBCO γ varies 5-7 with field orientation and temperature.
jc_data_table_ref_record_id is null on first ingest — Tier 3 Jc(B,T,θ) measurement record lands separately (RTSC.md §8.7).
Hc2 at 77 K (~7 T) is a rough orientation-averaged figure; field-parallel vs field-perpendicular differ by γ.
absorbed=false until vendor datasheet is cross-validated by an independent lab measurement (g3 RTSC.md §8.7).
citations: Iwasa, Y., 'Case Studies in Superconducting Magnets' 2nd ed.
